heuristics.reachability: Authentication logic appears to reconverge success and failure conditions into a permissive result for reachable caller-controlled state.
heuristics.remediation_intent: Separate failure handling from the success path, require all auth predicates to pass, and add explicit deny-by-default returns.
heuristics.title: Potential fail-open authorization logic in check_admin_token
heuristics.verification_tests: Add tests for invalid credentials and partial-auth states to ensure every failure path returns denial.

heuristics.reachability: User-controlled bytes appear to flow into unsafe string-copy primitives reachable from the analyzed binary entrypoints.
heuristics.remediation_intent: Replace unsafe copies with length-checked APIs, validate input size before writes, and add negative-path tests for oversized data.
heuristics.title: Potential unsafe buffer handling in vulnerable_copy
heuristics.verification_tests: Add unit tests with oversized strings and assert rejection or truncation without memory corruption.

heuristics.class: CWE-190-like integer overflow influencing memory allocation
heuristics.reachability: External numeric fields appear to influence multiplication or size calculations before allocation or copy operations.
heuristics.remediation_intent: Introduce checked arithmetic for size calculations and reject values that overflow or exceed expected bounds before allocation.
heuristics.title: Potential arithmetic-driven allocation bug in multiply_count
heuristics.verification_tests: Add boundary tests covering large count values and assert checked-failure behavior instead of wrapped sizes.

swap_candidates.remediation_intent: Separate failure handling from the success path, require all auth predicates to pass, and add explicit deny-by-default returns.
